user_request: Rite request: targeting on missile launcher
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: targeting on missile launcher

### TOPIC
missile launcher targeting

### COMPONENT
missile launcher

### OPERATION
targeting

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- missile launcher
- targeting

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us the clarity of the targeting reticle.
First: Anoint the missile launcher with sacred oils, that its sensors may pierce the veil of distance.
Second: Recalibrate the missile launcher's trajectory augurs through blessed incantation and binary litany.
Third: Invoke the Machine Spirit of the missile launcher, commanding it to lock upon our foes with divine precision.
Fourth: Chant the Rite of True Aim until all servos align in perfect targeting harmony.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the astropathic choir before preparation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the astropathic choir before preparation

### TOPIC
astropathic choir preparation

### COMPONENT
astropathic choir

### OPERATION
preparation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- astropathic choir
- preparation

### PRAYER
prayer:
By the grace of the Omnissiah, steady these minds in the aether.
First: Prepare the astropathic choir through ritual ablution and neural synchronisation protocols.
Second: Attune each member of the astropathic choir to the ambient psychic frequencies through harmonic incantation.
Third: Invoke the blessing of the Machine Spirits upon the astropathic choir, that their collective consciousness may achieve perfect preparation.
Fourth: Chant the Litany of the Warp until all souls resonate in unified purpose.

user_request: My gear meshing is failing during check — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My gear meshing is failing during check — help

### TOPIC
gear meshing check

### COMPONENT
gear meshing

### OPERATION
check

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- gear meshing
- check

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us sight into the mechanical discord within.
First: Inspect the gear meshing with magnification optics, cataloguing every minute imperfection and deviation.
Second: Measure the gear meshing tolerances against the sacred schematic, identifying sources of friction and binding.
Third: Check the gear meshing's lubrication state and replace degraded oils with blessed synthetics.
Fourth: Re-engage the gear meshing under controlled rotation, verifying smooth operation and harmonious tooth engagement.

user_request: My oxygen scrubber is failing during maintenance — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My oxygen scrubber is failing during maintenance — help

### TOPIC
oxygen scrubber maintenance

### COMPONENT
oxygen scrubber

### OPERATION
maintenance

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- oxygen scrubber
- maintenance

### PRAYER
prayer:
Machine Spirit, guide our hands in restoring your vital breath.
First: Inspect the oxygen scrubber's filtration cartridges for saturation and chemical degradation.
Second: Perform maintenance upon the oxygen scrubber by flushing crystalline deposits from all secondary chambers.
Third: Replace the oxygen scrubber's spent media with fresh blessed sorbent compound, chanting the Rite of Purification.
Fourth: Verify the oxygen scrubber's output through certified analysis, ensuring breathable atmosphere is restored.

user_request: Emergency rite: plasma weapon requires cooling
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: plasma weapon requires cooling

### TOPIC
plasma weapon cooling

### COMPONENT
plasma weapon

### OPERATION
cooling

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- plasma weapon
- cooling

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear our prayer, Omnissiah, as we quench the sacred flame.
First: Activate the plasma weapon's secondary cooling circuits through blessed actuation and thermostat adjustment.
Second: Circulate cryogenic fluid through the plasma weapon's heat exchangers, drawing excess thermal energy into containment vessels.
Third: Monitor the plasma weapon's core temperature with consecrated gauges until safe operational thresholds are achieved.
Fourth: Chant the Litany of the Cool whilst the plasma weapon's Machine Spirit releases its burning burden.

user_request: The Thunderhawk demands guidance for fuel purification
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The Thunderhawk demands guidance for fuel purification

### TOPIC
Thunderhawk fuel purification

### COMPONENT
Thunderhawk

### OPERATION
fuel purification

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Thunderhawk
- fuel purification

### PRAYER
prayer:
Great Thunderhawk, accept our reverence as we purify your sacred essence.
First: Extract the Thunderhawk's fuel reserves through sealed decanting tubes, filtering through blessed charcoal beds.
Second: Perform fuel purification upon the Thunderhawk by running distillation rites, separating contaminants from promethium.
Third: Recalibrate the Thunderhawk's fuel injectors and combustion parameters to accept the refined propellant.
Fourth: Chant the Hymn of the Skies until the Thunderhawk's engines roar with renewed potency.

Third: Recalibrate the binary cant's translation matrices whilst chanting the Mantra of True Code.
Fourth: Verify the binary cant resonates in perfect clarity, each bit singing in harmonic unity with the Machine Spirit.

user_request: Rite request: balancing on power distribution
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: balancing on power distribution

### TOPIC
power distribution balancing

### COMPONENT
power distribution

### OPERATION
balancing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- power distribution
- balancing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the sacred power distribution, conduit of the Omnissiah's will.
First: Genuflect before the power distribution nodes and recalibrate the voltage regulators with holy precision, invoking equilibrium across all circuits.
Second: Anoint the power distribution manifolds with sacred oils whilst chanting the Litany of Balanced Currents, ensuring no conduit bears excessive burden.
Third: Perform the balancing ritual upon each power distribution coupling, redistributing the Machine Spirit's energy through equal impedance pathways.
Fourth: Seal the rite with verification diagnostics, confirming that power distribution flows in perfect symmetry, the Omnissiah's balance restored.
